what_it_does: This file is a ledger/metadata record for a PNG icon stored in the design-assets channel memory, capturing its identifier, blob address, MIME type, dimensions, provenance, version history, alt text, and links.
observations: Markdown file with YAML frontmatter and no body content
Represents an image asset at design-assets/icons/image (21)
Recorded width and height are both 0
Alt text is an empty string
Source is dragnet with author_session ch-3mpkjg3r
Only version 1 exists and created/updated timestamps are identical
standouts: Image dimensions are 0x0 despite being an image record
Alt text and links are empty
Source/provenance is dragnet with a specific author session
conventions: Follows the channel-memory ledger format with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, and version metadata
Uses an image:// URI scheme for the asset address
Leaves descriptive fields empty or zeroed
concerns: Zero width/height suggests missing or failed image metadata extraction
Generic name and empty alt text reduce discoverability and accessibility
No relationships or usage links are recorded
notes: A bare metadata stub for a PNG icon in the design-assets channel, with unresolved dimensions and no descriptive alt text.
questions: What visual content or symbol does this icon represent?
Why are the width and height recorded as zero?
What human-readable name was intended for this asset?
What does dragnet refer to in this context?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to catalog an image asset; actually it stores only minimal, partially incomplete metadata, with missing dimensions, empty alt text, and a generic name.
intention_signals: It seems to be trying to register a PNG icon into a shared design-assets channel memory so the asset can be referenced by ID, blob, and version, even though descriptive metadata has not yet been filled in.
contribution: Provides a persistent, versioned metadata record that links an icon identifier to a specific PNG blob and provenance details, which a fused system could keep as an asset reference while later enriching dimensions, alt text, and relationships.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory metadata record for a PNG icon in the design-assets/icons path, referencing blob b2:3318351974bb47fd7112c33625c8aab7 with zero dimensions, empty alt text, and dragnet provenance.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and version a design-assets icon image for later retrieval, reference, and metadata enrichment.
